content: This is a post! There will possibly be more posts in the future! Exciting, isn't it?

date: June 8th, 2026 - The World is Always Ending
content: ...and yet the world does not quite seem to 100% get the memo. Perhaps if I went out and interacted with many more unstable and shifting elements, I'd think otherwise. But as it stands now, the world around me feels too permanent for something that should fundamentally be wholly impermanent. I wake up in the same place that I've fallen asleep in, inhabiting the same physical form with the same experienes and roughly the same memories. Every room and building that I've grown familiar with is in exactly the same spot that I've always known them to be and they will remain in such spots until natural forces, human hands, or post-human entities topple and remake them in the distant future. Until the time comes that the rigid boundaries and seemingly unalterable rules binding the world together come apart, I'll only ever be able to get halfway at most into the sunken world of dreams and fantasy. I await the end of all illusions of rigidity and permanence patiently.
